summary: Adjusted the chapter exit so Tomas leaves the district ledger line open overnight, matching the Chapter 3 boundary setup while preserving the stolen-fuel bargain, the sex-for-access leverage, and the chapter's existing opening.
edits: Changed the dock aftermath so Tomas delays writing the falsified ledger entry until the following night.
Revised Mina's closing reflections to center the waiting blank line and the date already in Tomas's hand.
